# Filmmaker Genius

> AI tools and step-by-step training for indie filmmakers — from first draft to distribution.

Filmmaker Genius is a production OS for independent filmmakers. It combines a suite of smart tools (script and scene analysis, storyboarding, pitch decks, call sheets, funding strategy, distribution readiness) with a full academy of courses covering every phase of filmmaking, plus the Green Light Engine — a niche and identity framework for building a sustainable directing career.

## Tools

- [Toolbox](https://filmmakergenius.com/toolbox): All filmmaking tools by phase
- [Scene Analysis](https://filmmakergenius.com/scene-analysis): Break down any scene instantly
- [Script Analysis](https://filmmakergenius.com/script-analysis): Full screenplay coverage and notes
- [Storyboard Generator](https://filmmakergenius.com/storyboard): Visualize scenes shot by shot
- [Table Read](https://filmmakergenius.com/table-read): AI-voiced screenplay table reads
- [Pitch Deck Maker](https://filmmakergenius.com/pitch-deck): Investor-ready film pitch decks
- [Call Sheet Generator](https://filmmakergenius.com/call-sheet): Professional daily call sheets
- [Contract Assistant](https://filmmakergenius.com/contract-assistant): Draft and review film contracts
- [Funding Strategy](https://filmmakergenius.com/funding-strategy): Map grants, investors, and crowdfunding
- [Distribution Readiness](https://filmmakergenius.com/distribution-readiness): Assess your film for release
- [Recut](https://filmmakergenius.com/recut): Rework and restructure your edit
- [Crew Jobs](https://filmmakergenius.com/crew-hire): Hire and get hired on indie productions

## Academy

- [Academy](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy): 60+ filmmaking courses across every phase
- [The Roberts Filmmaking Method](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-make-a-movie): End-to-end indie feature framework

- [Screenplay Writing 101](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-write-a-screenplay)
- [Story Structure & the Three-Act Format](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/screenplay-act-structure)
- [Writing the Short Film](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-write-a-short-film-script)
- [Writing the Logline & Pitch Document](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-write-a-logline)

- [Writing for Documentary](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/documentary-script-writing)
- [The Rewrite: Developing Through Drafts](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-rewrite-a-screenplay)
- [Script Breakdown Fundamentals](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-script-breakdown)
- [Storyboarding for Indie Features](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-storyboard-a-film)
- [Budgeting & Scheduling Essentials](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-budgeting-and-scheduling)

- [Hiring Your Department Heads](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/hiring-department-heads)
- [Production Design on a Budget](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/production-design-on-a-budget)
- [Wardrobe & Costume on a Budget](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/costume-design-for-film)
- [Building a Shot List from Your Script](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/shot-list-filmmaking)
- [Working with SAG-AFTRA on Low-Budget Films](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/sag-aftra-for-filmmakers)
- [Permits & Releases: The Full Picture](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-permits-and-releases)
- [Insurance & Legal Basics for Filmmakers](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-production-insurance)

- [On-Set Protocols & Safety](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-set-safety)

- [Working with Child Actors](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/working-with-child-actors)
- [Working with Non-Actors](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/directing-non-actors)
- [iPhone & Mirrorless Camera Filmmaking](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/smartphone-filmmaking)
- [Drone Cinematography for Indie Films](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/drone-cinematography)
- [Stunt & Action Coordination Basics](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-film-action-scenes)
- [Producing a Documentary](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-produce-a-documentary)

- [Music Licensing for Indie Films](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/music-licensing-for-films)
- [Working with a Composer](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/working-with-a-film-composer)
- [Visual Effects on a Budget](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/vfx-on-a-budget)
- [Creating Your Film Trailer](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-make-a-film-trailer)

- [DIY Film Distribution](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/diy-film-distribution)
- [Social Media Marketing for Your Film](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/social-media-marketing-for-films)
- [Building a Film Website & Press Strategy](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-make-a-film-website)
- [Pitching to Netflix, Amazon & Streaming Platforms](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/how-to-pitch-to-streamers)
- [SVOD vs AVOD vs TVOD: Choosing Your Platform](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/streaming-revenue-models)
- [International Sales & Foreign Distribution](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/international-film-sales)
- [Film Markets: AFM, Cannes & Berlin](https://filmmakergenius.com/academy/film-markets-explained)

## Green Light Engine

- [Green Light Engine](https://filmmakergenius.com/green-light-engine): Career framework for directors
- [Niche & Identity](https://filmmakergenius.com/green-light-engine/niche): Define your directing niche
